_comment: CAPTIONS-PIPELINE-01 MT golden set (ADR-0051 §6, REV-10). One block per ENABLED source->target pair (S88: EN-source -> nl/es/de/fr). `mt` is the deterministic mocked M2M100 translated_text; `reference` is the human gold translation. The eval asserts the parsed MT structure and WER(reference, mt) <= CAPTION_WER_BAR. A pair whose fixtures exceed the bar is NOT added to CAPTION_PAIR_ENABLED. Non-EN-source pairs are intentionally absent (degrade-to-source until S89+).

pairs.sourceText: welcome everyone to the quarterly all hands
pairs.reference: welkom allemaal bij de driemaandelijkse vergadering
pairs.mt: welkom allemaal bij de driemaandelijkse vergadering

pairs.sourceText: welcome everyone to the quarterly all hands
pairs.reference: bienvenidos todos a la reunion trimestral
pairs.mt: bienvenidos todos a la reunion trimestral

pairs.sourceText: welcome everyone to the quarterly all hands
welcome everyone to the quarterly all hands
pairs.reference: bienvenue a tous a la reunion trimestrielle
pairs.mt: bienvenue a tous a la reunion trimestrielle
